page: OVHcloud r2-240 is a memory-optimized server built on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 16 dedicated physical Intel cores running at 2.2 GHz with one thread per core. The system is based on the Haswell microarchitecture without TSX instructions, featuring 16 MB of L3 cache and support for AVX, AES, and FMA instructions. It is configured with 240 GB of RAM, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 15 GB per core. Local storage is provided by a bundled 400 GB SSD, and network connectivity is supported by a 10 Gbps baseline bandwidth.

Performance benchmarks reveal a distinct contrast between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core CPU performance is poor, placing in the bottom 10% for stress-ng and bottom 25% for Geekbench. However, multi-core scaling reaches average levels, with stress-ng multi-core, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores all positioning in the middle 50%. Memory bandwidth for uncached large blocks is weak, though cached small-block reads perform at average speeds.

Given its high memory density and average database and Redis throughput, the r2-240 is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-bound workloads that do not require high single-threaded compute power. It is suitable for database hosting, caching layers, and memory-intensive applications, but is poorly suited for LLM inference or heavy single-threaded processing.
description: OVHcloud r2-240 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated Intel physical cores on an x86_64 architecture running at 2.2 GHz. It is configured with 240 GB of RAM, offering a high resource density of 15 GB per core, alongside a bundled 400 GB local SSD and 10 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. The processor includes 16 MB of L3 cache and supports AVX and AES instructions. Benchmark data indicates a clear tradeoff: single-core CPU execution and uncached memory bandwidth are weak to poor, whereas multi-core scaling, database operations, and Redis throughput reach average tiers. This hardware profile makes the server qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-heavy workloads that do not demand high single-threaded compute. It is best suited for database hosting, caching layers, and memory-bound applications.
og_description: OVHcloud r2-240 is a memory-optimized server featuring 16 dedicated Intel cores, 240 GB of RAM, and a 400 GB SSD. It delivers average multi-core scaling and database performance for memory-bound workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized server offering high RAM density and dedicated cores for database hosting and caching workloads.
